connectors.note: Different designator prefix (UG vs UF) from left ports.
CC 0V and External RD design. Q5420/Q5428/Q5429 MOSFETs. PPVBUS_USBC5 at VOLTAGE=20V.
0.5A over-current limit. HDMI output 0.25-6.0 Gbps. DDC = 100kBPS.
PCIe to SoC (PCIE_SD_UHS2_D2R/R2D). SD_WAKE_L for wake detection. I2C debug via UK700 level shifter.
J5150 pattern PWR-MLB-X1704. J5151 (FF14A-6C-R11DL-B-3H) for debug. PPVBAT_AON_CONN rail. SYS_DETECT_L, SMBUS_BATT_SCL/SDA. BMU power flex hotbar'd to MLB (632-04146, PCBA_FLEX_BMU-POWER_X1703).

connectors.type: Internal display flex (Mini-LED Liquid Retina XDR, 16")
connectors.note: LPDP INT data lanes. SPI TCON MISO/MOSI/CLK connections. 3.0V I/O connects to SMC I2C4. LP600/LP601 OMIT_TABLE CMC (050009D2, 1.7uH).
LPDP_FTCAM_AUX/DATA connections. I2C_CAM_1V8_SCL/SDA. I2C_ALS_1V8_SCL/SDA. PP5V_S2_CAMERA power. ALS_INT_L interrupt.
I2C_BKLT_1V8_SCL/SDA. BL_PMIC_PWR_EN. SPI_DISP_BKLT CLK/MOSI/MISO/CS connections. PPVOUT_LUXE power. PP1V2_AWAKE_BKLTCONN. PP3V8_AWAKE_BKLTCONN.
PP16V0_TOUCHID boost, PP3V0_TOUCHID, PP1V8_TOUCHID. Mesa backlight with TOUCHID_BKLT_PWM.

connectors.type: Headphone jack + mic (matinGM plug APN 516S1189, same as J214)
connectors.note: AUDIO_JACK_LEFT/RIGHT_OUT, GB/CH_MIC. Audio codec Carlow B0 via FLR901-FLR907 ferrites (15000HM-0.4A-0.8OHM). AUD_CONN_HP_LEFT/RIGHT, AUD_CONN_RING2, AUD_CONN_SLEEVE.
L Woofer 1 (SPKRAMP_A), L Woofer 2 (SPKRAMP_B), L Tweeter (SPKRAMP_C). J152 CONN APN 518S00818 for P0. J316 CONN APN 516S00690 for P1. POR COST CONN APN 516S00787 for P1C,P2S.
R Woofer 1 (SPKRAMP_D), R Woofer 2 (SPKRAMP_E), R Tweeter (SPKRAMP_F). APN 516S00787.
FF14A-6C-R11DL-B-3H. AUD_DMIC0/1 CLK/DATA. PP1V8_DMIC via LR940 ferrite (FERR-470-OHM).
SPI_AOP_LAS connections. PP1V8_AON_LAS, PP3V3_AON_LAS, PP1V2_S2_LAS power. Current per rail: 1.2 S2 = 22uA/1.2mA, 1.8 AON = 30uA/8mA, 3.3 AON = 1uA/10mA.
FAN_TACH (tachometer), FAN_PWM (speed control). Left fan PBUS ISENSE on page 65.
